heading: Templestowe vs Templestowe Lower — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Templestowe, Victoria and Templestowe Lower, Victoria. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Templestowe Lower has a lower overall climate risk score (34/100) compared to Templestowe (37/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Templestowe or Templestowe Lower safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Templestowe has a flood risk score of 47/100, while Templestowe Lower scores 32/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Templestowe scores 56/100 for bushfire risk. Templestowe Lower scores 31/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Templestowe or Templestowe Lower?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Templestowe Lower has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.05% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
